hero_title_accent: KYT Risk Threshold Management for VASPs
hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams connect and aggregate wallet risk scores and transaction monitoring data into a unified workflow for managing risk thresholds and audit-ready case evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to aggregate and interpret wallet and transaction risk signals from multiple providers. This leads to inconsistent risk thresholds, slow reviews, and challenges linking alerts to customers and cases across fragmented data sets.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates risk signals from multiple KYT providers and links wallet and transaction risk scores to customers, alerts and cases, enabling compliance teams to apply consistent thresholds within one operational workflow.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk scores, routes alerts for review, opens cases, records decisions and preserves evidence for audit-ready compliance workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented risk scores. One risk evidence layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY aggregates KYT provider outputs into connected risk reviews, decision records, cases and audit-ready evidence to improve control over wallet and transaction risk thresholds.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing transaction and wallet risk aggregation with audit-ready evidence, bank due diligence and controlled enterprise deployment from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support KYT risk threshold management workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how wallet risk scores aggregate across transactions
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports transaction risk decisions
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Explain how risk thresholds guide case creation and escalation
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for KYT compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects wallet and transaction risk signals into connected compliance workflows, helping KYT teams aggregate risk scores, link alerts, and manage cases across digital asset transactions.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage KYT risk thresholds?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies configurable risk thresholds to aggregated wallet and transaction data, generating alerts and routing reviews based on internal policies and selected provider outputs.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready KYT evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and linked wallet-risk evidence to support structured review and audit readiness in compliance investigations.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple KYT and blockchain analytics providers, consolidating their risk signals into one operational layer without replacing any underlying systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace underlying KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYT or Travel Rule providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows, evidence packages and compliance decisions.
final_title: Connect wallet and transaction risk scores
final_description: Review how SFTY aggregates KYT alerts into audit-ready cases for controlled risk threshold management and compliance workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
